links.source_location: svelte() plugin registration mirrors svelte.config.js preprocess options
the openapi.yaml pulled from the EveMerc backend and compiled to schema.d.ts is the exact contract api/client.ts types itself against
readCache/writeCache keyed by serverUrl+namespace mirror the FleetSnapshot/MapChoice shapes consumed in loadFleetWorkspace
both modules follow the same defensive-normalization pattern over unknown JSON payloads before throwing a user-facing Error
both independently react to authentication failure: onResponse clears token on 401, DesktopAuthFlow surfaces a 'failed' phase on rejected callbacks
createEveMercApi used to build the client under test
chromeless popout with pin + opacity slider
section 17.11, section 9.4 raw lines never written
byte offset persistence, partial line handling, EOF start
section 17.11 raw lines in memory only long enough to parse
